{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Web of Silence
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Web of Silence]] is a shimmering purple-and-orange web from a strange [[Path]] that attacks the mind and spirit.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
